value.found_quote: Permission rules follow the format `Tool` or `Tool(specifier)`.
value.rationale: The page contains a dedicated "Permission rule syntax" section describing the `Tool` or `Tool(specifier)` format, exact matches (e.g. `Bash(npm run build)`), input-parameter matching (`Tool(param:value)`), and wildcard/glob patterns. All elements of the claim are substantiated verbatim.
